title: Resolution Approving the Supplemental Investment Program (SIP) for the Supplemental Budget for the Year 2021 in the Amount of Nine Million Five Hundred Fifty-one Thousand Eighty-four Pesos and 80/100 (P 9,551,084.80) Covering Various Expenditures for General Fund Proper and Two Hundred Fifty-seven Thousand Three Hundred Sixty-six Pesos and 75/100 (P 257,366.75) for Slaughterhouse Operation. (AUTHOR: HON. GERONIMO A. CICERON, 04/19/2021)
